title: Gemini Omni Tutorial: How to Use Gemini Omni AI for Beginners
summary: A tutorial reviewing Google's Gemini Omni Flash for AI video editing, covering physics simulation, character consistency, scene memory, and workflow integration. The presenter evaluates where Omni changes editing workflows versus where it still falls short compared to alternatives like Sora and Seedance 2.
writeup: This tutorial walks through Google's Gemini Omni Flash as a tool for AI video editing, demonstrating physics simulation, character consistency, scene memory, and how the model fits into existing editing workflows. The presenter assesses which parts of the editing process Omni meaningfully changes and which parts still lag behind alternatives such as Sora and Seedance 2. The takeaway is a grounded comparison of Omni's strengths and limitations rather than a blanket endorsement, with attention to iterative refinement and memory across scenes.
